content: hi everyone, im new to this game. what chapter will i learn more about faros in? i think her design is really awesome
oh faros... im sorry to say but shes one of the unlucky ones that doesnt have a lot of lore outside her archive and affinity stories
huh, interesting. Playing through the Lily side story at the moment and apparently an awakener can link to more than one person? Guess that can explain why linking to asylum patients worked well
oh, how do i read those? are those the things you can unlock with the little items you get from playing 50 cards?
Nautila also suffers from that <:Sadge:1182745658692735106>
you unlock stories by gaining affinity with an awakener. Basically unlock them (and affinity voice lines) by using them in missions
oh that's great, i will start using her a lot then
you can also put her as your guest on the main screen, that will make her gain passive affinity over time

Something like that, when you reach 10 Affinity with a Character by playing them in Content such as Main Story, Traphase and Event Stages you can then look into Frenzy Reproduction where you can then read some of their Side Stories
will do!!
Though, it's much more costly now
yeah helot is in interesting case. but i guess its not entirely unusual

so you could read those first
